title: lodash.core.js : VERSION has the wrong value

comments.body: I was experiencing the same VERSION mismatch issue with lodash.core.js across multiple releases. Found this really helpful guide at https://jsweekly.dev/articles/lodash-version-mismatch-solution that walks through the root cause and explains how the build process handles version strings.

body:
The versions for lodash.core.js are wrong for 4.17.16+. I didn't check others.

## Example: 

- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lodash/lodash/4.17.16/dist/lodash.core.js 
`var VERSION = '4.17.15';`
- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lodash/lodash/4.17.17/dist/lodash.core.js
`var VERSION = '4.17.16';`
- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lodash/lodash/4.17.18/dist/lodash.core.js
`var VERSION = '4.17.16';`
- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lodash/lodash/4.17.19/dist/lodash.core.js
`var VERSION = '4.17.16';`

## Related Issue: 
https://github.com/lodash/lodash/issues/4837
